name: designviz
description: DesignViz — Interactive Software Engineering Design Concepts Teacher

scripts.lint: npx eslint@8 --no-eslintrc --env browser,es2022 --global RateLimiterAlgorithm --global CircuitBreakerAlgorithm --global LoadBalancerAlgorithm --global PubSubAlgorithm --global RetryAlgorithm --global ConnPoolAlgorithm --global ConsistentHashAlgorithm --rule '{"no-undef": "error", "no-unused-vars": "warn"}' --ignore-pattern '*-algorithm.js' --ignore-pattern '*-algorithm.test.js' --ignore-pattern 'run-tests.js' rate-limiter.js circuit-breaker.js load-balancer.js pubsub.js retry.js conn-pool.js consistent-hash.js
